title: Service Agreement
subtitle: Please agree to the following terms to use Travel Planner
allAgreeDescription: Agree to all required and optional items
jitNote: Location, notification, and photo permissions will be requested when you use those features

privacy_required.title: Privacy Policy (Required)
privacy_required.description: Required for account management and service provision

location.title: Location Information Usage
location.description: Used for nearby place search and travel route recommendations

notification.title: Push Notifications
notification.description: Receive travel reminders and sharing notifications

photo.title: Photo Access
photo.description: Used for profile image and travel photo uploads

marketing.title: Marketing Communications
marketing.description: Receive promotional offers and new feature announcements

errors.requiredConsent: Please agree to the required terms
